phase_title: Public Matches Upcoming and Past Range Query Hotfix
activation_note: The human explicitly approved repository-controlled activation of HOTFIX-PUBLIC-MATCHES-UPCOMING-v1. Codex must execute only this hotfix, verify and apply only the canonical payload, modify only apps/api/src/public-api.ts and apps/api/src/public-api.test.ts, run every exact validation, preserve unrelated local changes including apps/web/next-env.d.ts and apps/web/tsconfig.json, perform no migration, database mutation, external service access, deployment, or production operation, stop after Automation v2 Prepare, and must not activate or execute 10H-A or any successor.
